severity_scale.meaning: Can expose restricted route, publish without approval, mutate public surface, expose secret, or break rollback.
Can break Admin/Editor workflow, listing consistency, audit completeness, or correction flow.
Can create confusing workflow, stale state, weak messaging, or incomplete readiness.
Cosmetic, wording, UI clarity or non-blocking documentation gap.
